summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All requested features verified working. Bug fixes for thumbnail endpoint, story viewer, and profile highlights all working correctly.

issues: Video posts show 'React Native WebView does not support this platform' on web - expected behavior for web preview
Console warnings: expo-av deprecation (SDK 54), shadow* style deprecation (use boxShadow), pointerEvents deprecation, useNativeDriver warning - cosmetic warnings

critical_code_review_comments: THUMBNAIL ENDPOINT VERIFIED: /api/thumbnail/{filename} generates JPEG thumbnails from videos using ffmpeg, caches as _thumb.jpg, returns cached version on subsequent calls. Works correctly.
STORIES API VERIFIED: GET /api/stories returns stories grouped by user with user_id, username, profile_image, stories array. Structure matches frontend expectations.
STORY VIEWER VERIFIED: /(main)/story/[id].tsx loads all stories, displays progress bars, username, avatar, close button. Navigation from home stories bar works.
PROFILE HIGHLIGHTS VERIFIED: Shows only NEW button when user has no active stories. Story highlights render actual thumbnails when stories exist.
USER POSTS VERIFIED: GET /api/users/{user_id}/posts returns posts with type field (photo/video/text) for proper thumbnail handling.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing video file 16ab7897-6830-4eb0-99c2-1b7f08bdae07.mp4 for thumbnail tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 bug fixes verified: 1) Thumbnail endpoint works with ffmpeg caching. 2) Story viewer shows progress bars, sequential playback UI, close button. 3) Profile highlights show real story thumbnails or just NEW button if no stories. 4) Posts grid uses video thumbnails for video posts. Previous iteration 7 tests still passing. ffmpeg is installed at /usr/bin/ffmpeg.
